sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Gap to AI-enable supply chain for traceability
feed.summary: Gap Inc. is deploying the Inspectorio AI platform across its brands (Old Navy, Gap, Banana Republic, Athleta) to enhance supply chain visibility, quality management, and supplier collaboration for improved product traceability. This expands on Gap's previous digital innovation efforts, which include using Boston Dynamics "Stretch" robots and Kindred Sort picking robots in distribution centers. The company also acquired Context-Based 4 Casting Ltd. (CB4) in 2021 to further its AI and machine learning capabilities.

feed.title: KeyBanc reiterates Trimble stock rating on AI positioning strength By Investing.com
feed.summary: KeyBanc has reiterated its Overweight rating on Trimble Navigation (NASDAQ:TRMB) with a $94.00 price target, citing the company's strong positioning in AI development. This follows a meeting with Trimble management, where KeyBanc gained clarity on Trimble's advanced AI capabilities and growth opportunities in its FS and AECO segments. The firm expresses confidence in Trimble's ability to maintain low-teens annual recurring revenue growth and double-digit EPS growth.

feed.title: JM Smucker stock hits 52-week low at 92.98 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: JM Smucker's stock has reached a 52-week low of $92.91, reflecting a 17.99% decline over the past year and indicating decreased investor confidence. Despite the stock appearing oversold by RSI and offering a 4.69% dividend yield, its Fair Value analysis suggests it may be overvalued. Recent third-quarter earnings surpassed expectations in revenue and operating margin, though the company narrowed its revenue outlook due to disruptions and weaker performance in its Sweet Baked Snacks portfolio.

feed.title: International Paper Discloses Executive Dealings in Deferred Compensation Stock Fund
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) has disclosed activity in its Deferred Compensation Savings Plan, a retirement plan for highly compensated employees. Senior Vice President Joseph R. Saab acquired 436 units in the Company Stock Fund on April 7, 2026, at $34.54 per unit. This transaction highlights executive participation and transparency within the company's equity-linked compensation structure.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering Auto Callable Buffered Return Enhanced Notes linked to the MSCI Emerging Markets Index, with payments fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These structured investments are designed for investors seeking early exit at a premium if the index hits a Call Value or an uncapped return if the notes are not called and the index appreciates, but also involve risks including potential principal loss. The offering is detailed in a preliminary pricing supplement outlining key terms, risk factors, and tax considerations.

feed.title: SLB OneSubsea wins HPHT boosting contract for Shenandoah field in U.S. Gulf
feed.summary: SLB’s OneSubsea joint venture has secured a contract from Beacon Offshore Energy to provide a high-pressure, high-temperature (HPHT) multiphase boosting system for the Shenandoah field in the U.S. Gulf of Mexico. This system is designed to operate at pressures above 15,000 psi, enhancing recovery and extending the field life in challenging deepwater conditions. The project underscores the growing trend of utilizing advanced subsea technologies to optimize production from complex offshore assets.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Axon Enterprise (AXON) After The Recent Share Price Slide
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise (AXON) has seen significant share price declines recently, with a 30.5% drop year-to-date. The article uses Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis and Price-to-Sales (P/S) ratios to evaluate the company's valuation. While DCF suggests Axon is fairly valued, the P/S ratio indicates it might be undervalued when compared to its "Fair Ratio."

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Travelers Companies to $305 From $285, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Travelers Companies (TRV) to $305 from $285, while keeping an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a continued positive outlook on the company, aligning with other recent analyst revisions. The article also notes several other analysts who have recently updated their price targets for Travelers Companies.

feed.title: State Street expands servicing for Thornburg ETF share classes
feed.summary: State Street Corporation has expanded its relationship with Thornburg Investment Management to provide comprehensive servicing support for Thornburg's new ETF share classes. This move enables Thornburg to offer both mutual fund and ETF share classes from the same portfolio, broadening access to its active investment strategies. State Street will handle various services including custody, accounting, and settlement, building on a relationship that began in 1987.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust Builds Japan AI Hub While Testing Capital Strength
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust has expanded its AI infrastructure in Japan with the opening of the NRT14 data center and the Asia Pacific Innovation Lab in Tokyo, both designed to support advanced AI workloads. This strategic move, coupled with new capital-raising leadership hires, aims to fund capital-intensive, high-density projects primarily through third-party capital rather than relying solely on the company’s balance sheet. Investors should monitor the leasing progress of NRT14, utilization of the Tokyo lab, and the effectiveness of the new capital partnerships, especially given short-term earnings forecasts and interest coverage concerns.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Prudential Financial to $95 From $103, Maintains Underweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Prudential Financial (PRU) to $95 from $103, while maintaining an Underweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions, including Jefferies maintaining a Buy rating with a reduced price target and BMO Capital maintaining an Underperform rating with a slightly decreased price target. The article highlights recent analyst activities for Prudential Financial.

feed.title: 341 Merrill Advisors Recognized on the 2026 Barron's "Top 1,500 Financial Advisors" List. Published on March 20, 2026. Ranking based on data as of September 30, 2025. – Company Announcement
feed.summary: Merrill Wealth Management announced that 341 of its advisors, including Merrill Private Wealth Advisors, have been recognized on the 2026 Barron's Top 1,500 Financial Advisors List. Nine of these Merrill advisors were also named No. 1 in their respective states, highlighting the firm's strong talent and commitment to client service. This recognition is based on data as of September 30, 2025, and evaluates factors such as assets under management, revenue, regulatory record, and philanthropic work.

feed.title: Ford Motor Company and Sharrow Engineering Scale Production of the Sharrow Propeller in Detroit
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company and Sharrow Engineering are collaborating to scale production of the patented Sharrow™ Propeller in Detroit, utilizing advanced 3D sand-casting techniques. This partnership, facilitated by Michigan Central, significantly reduces production timelines from months to approximately two weeks, addressing the growing demand for Sharrow's marine propulsion technology. The initiative also expands Sharrow's manufacturing capabilities beyond marine into other areas like drones and renewable energy, reinforcing U.S.-based manufacturing and job growth in the Detroit region.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Announces Planned Chief Legal Officer Succession
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive has announced a planned succession for its Chief Legal Officer role. Jennifer M. Daniels will retire in 2026 after holding the position since 2014, with Betsy Fishbone set to assume the role in June 2026. Daniels will transition to Vice Chair to ensure a smooth handover, while analysts have a "Buy" rating on CL stock with a $102.00 price target.

feed.title: Bernstein SocGen reiterates Sysco stock rating after Restaurant Depot deal By Investing.com
feed.summary: Bernstein SocGen Group maintained a Market Perform rating and $90.00 price target for Sysco (NYSE:SYY) after its proposed acquisition of Restaurant Depot. The acquisition is expected to expand Sysco's customer base, merchandising capabilities, and market share in the higher-margin Cash and Carry business, enhancing its financial stability. However, the deal's high leverage introduces concerns about Sysco's risk profile and could lead to a lower trading multiple.

feed.title: Galmed Unveils Brain-Penetrant Aramchol Formulation, Expanding Flagship Drug Into CNS Diseases
feed.summary: Galmed Pharmaceuticals announced a new brain-penetrant formulation of its drug Aramchol, co-developed with Barcode Nanotech. This new formulation, delivered via lipid nanoparticles, can cross the blood-brain barrier and is intended to treat synucleinopathies like Parkinson's disease. The development expands Aramchol's potential from liver diseases into high-unmet-need Central Nervous System indications, leveraging AI-enabled screening for optimal delivery.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Chubb Price Target to $321 From $322, Maintains Equal Weight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Chubb Ltd. (CB) to $321 from $322, while reiterating an "Equal Weight" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions, with some firms raising their price targets and maintaining positive ratings, reflecting varied outlooks on the insurance giant. Chubb Limited, a Switzerland-based holding company, offers a broad range of insurance and reinsurance products globally.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on MetLife to $90 From $93, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for MetLife (MET) to $90 from $93, while reiterating an "Overweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst revisions for MetLife, with various firms maintaining "Buy," "Market Perform," or "Overweight" ratings but with differing price target changes.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) Lowered to "Neutral" Rating by BNP Paribas Exane
feed.summary: BNP Paribas Exane downgraded Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) from "outperform" to "neutral" with a $16 price target, indicating a 2.74% potential upside. Several other firms have also cut their price targets, and the consensus rating for Conagra on MarketBeat is "Reduce" with a target of $16.07. Conagra recently missed EPS estimates but beat revenue expectations, showing a 1.9% year-over-year revenue decline and a negative net margin.

feed.title: BTIG Research Initiates Coverage on Ameren (NYSE:AEE)
feed.summary: BTIG Research initiated a "buy" rating on Ameren (NYSE:AEE) with a $131 price target, indicating a potential 16.15% upside. This rating contributes to a mixed analyst sentiment for the utility provider, which currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating and a $114.92 target price from MarketBeat. Ameren recently surpassed quarterly EPS estimates and reported higher-than-expected revenue, despite a year-over-year decline.

feed.title: BNP Paribas Exane Has Lowered Expectations for Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC) Stock Price
feed.summary: BNP Paribas Exane has reduced its price target for Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC) from $19.00 to $18.00, maintaining an "underperform" rating, which suggests a potential downside of over 21% from its previous close. This downgrade reflects a broader weakening of analyst sentiment, with several other firms also trimming price targets or downgrading the stock. Despite Kraft Heinz reporting Q4 EPS of $0.67, exceeding estimates, the company showed a negative net margin and issued FY2026 EPS guidance significantly below analyst expectations.

feed.title: Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL) Stock Rating Lowered by JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has downgraded Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL) from "overweight" to "neutral," setting a new target price of $23.00, representing a 6.27% potential upside. This comes after Hormel Foods reported Q1 EPS of $0.34, exceeding estimates but missing revenue expectations, and provided FY2026 guidance lower than analysts' average forecast. Several other research firms have also adjusted their ratings on HRL, contributing to an overall "Hold" consensus among analysts with an average price target of $27.00.

feed.title: Willis Investment Counsel Grows Holdings in Tractor Supply Company $TSCO
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel increased its stake in Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ:TSCO) by 5.1% in the fourth quarter, now holding 677,691 shares valued at $33.9 million. Despite this, insiders have been net sellers, with significant sales from the CEO and EVP totaling nearly $12 million. Analyst sentiment is mixed, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus but recent downgrades and price target cuts reflecting heightened execution risk for TSCO.

feed.title: Evergy (NASDAQ:EVRG) Earns Buy Rating from Analysts at BTIG Research
feed.summary: BTIG Research initiated coverage on Evergy (NASDAQ:EVRG) with a "Buy" rating and a $99 price target, suggesting an 18.65% upside. This new rating aligns with a "Moderate Buy" consensus from other analysts, although the stock currently trades near its 52-week high. Analysts, including Zacks, have also incrementally raised multi-year EPS forecasts, indicating a slightly improved earnings outlook for the utility company.

feed.title: BNP Paribas Adjusts Equifax Price Target to $210 From $235, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: BNP Paribas has revised its price target for Equifax (EFX) shares to $210, down from the previous $235, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a moderated outlook for the professional information services company from the analyst firm. The article also notes other recent analyst adjustments for Equifax.

feed.title: Willis Investment Counsel Acquires 13,770 Shares of Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel increased its stake in Cisco Systems, Inc. by 1.7%, purchasing an additional 13,770 shares, bringing their total holdings to 833,033 shares valued at $64.17 million. This makes Cisco its second-largest holding, representing 3.3% of the fund's portfolio. Cisco recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with $1.04 EPS and $15.35 billion in revenue, and subsequently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.42 per share.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Likely To Report Higher Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of E
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE: WFC) is expected to report higher Q1 earnings, with analysts forecasting $1.58 per share and $21.77 billion in revenue. Several analysts have recently updated their ratings and price targets for Wells Fargo ahead of its earnings call on April 14, with a mix of Neutral, Outperform, Equal-Weight, and Buy ratings. The company recently announced Dennis Devine as its new head of Business Banking.

feed.title: Evercore Maintains Ulta Beauty(ULTA.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $675
feed.summary: Evercore has reiterated its Buy rating on Ulta Beauty (ULTA.US), maintaining a target price of $675. This continued positive outlook suggests the firm believes in the beauty retailer's strong performance and future growth prospects.

feed.title: Willis Investment Counsel Sells 27,800 Shares of The Clorox Company $CLX
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel has reduced its stake in The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) by 12.0%, selling 27,800 shares to now hold 204,600 shares valued at approximately $20.63 million. Clorox recently reported mixed Q4 results, missing EPS estimates but slightly beating revenue expectations, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.24. Brokerages have largely set a "Reduce" rating for Clorox with a consensus price target of $116.27.

feed.title: Gildan Activewear, Inc. $GIL Holdings Increased by Willis Investment Counsel
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel has increased its stake in Gildan Activewear (NYSE:GIL) by 48.5%, now holding 77,968 shares valued at approximately $4.87 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions, with institutional ownership now at 82.83%. Despite missing Q4 EPS estimates, Gildan reported a 31.1% revenue increase and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $80.08.

feed.title: Willis Investment Counsel Has $1.79 Million Holdings in Avery Dennison Corporation $AVY
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel significantly increased its stake in Avery Dennison Corporation, raising its holdings by 244.9% to 9,856 shares valued at approximately $1.79 million. This comes as several analysts have issued "Buy" or "Outperform" ratings and raised price targets for the stock, with a consensus rating of "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $207.75. Despite insider selling activity totaling $5.93 million in the last quarter, Avery Dennison displayed solid financial performance with a 3.9% revenue increase year-over-year and a declared quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT Stock Holdings Decreased by Willis Investment Counsel
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel reduced its holdings in Lockheed Martin (LMT) by 5.5% in Q4, making it their 8th largest holding. Institutional ownership for LMT is around 74.2%, with several other firms adjusting their stakes. The stock has a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average price target of $645.79, and while it recently beat revenue estimates, it missed EPS.

feed.title: Willis Investment Counsel Boosts Stock Holdings in Labcorp Holdings Inc. $LH
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel increased its stake in Labcorp Holdings Inc. by 6.2% in the fourth quarter, now owning 64,996 shares valued at $16.31 million. The article details other institutional investments, recent insider selling by executives, and Labcorp's financial performance, including beating EPS estimates but narrowly missing revenue targets for the last quarter. Analysts currently rate Labcorp with a "Moderate Buy" and an average target price of $307.70.

feed.title: Willis Investment Counsel Grows Stake in Keysight Technologies Inc. $KEYS
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel increased its stake in Keysight Technologies Inc. (NYSE:KEYS) by 5.7% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 80,609 shares valued at $16.38 million. This increase is part of a broader trend of institutional buying, with major firms like Allspring Global Investments and Woodline Partners also acquiring significant positions. Keysight Technologies recently exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $304.17.

feed.title: Willis Investment Counsel Grows Stock Holdings in Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. $JKHY
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel significantly increased its stake in Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) by 201.2% in the fourth quarter, holding 17,611 shares valued at $3.21 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the company. Jack Henry & Associates exceeded Q2 earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.72 and revenue of $611.2 million, and raised its quarterly dividend, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $200.15.

feed.title: Willis Investment Counsel Takes Position in Waste Management, Inc. $WM
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel initiated a new position in Waste Management, Inc. (WM) during the fourth quarter, acquiring 69,021 shares valued at approximately $15.17 million. This move comes as corporate insiders were net sellers of WM stock last quarter, while other institutional investors significantly increased their holdings. Waste Management also recently raised its quarterly dividend, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $254.59.

feed.title: Willis Investment Counsel Has $16.66 Million Stock Holdings in W.W. Grainger, Inc. $GWW
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel increased its stake in W.W. Grainger, Inc. (NYSE:GWW) by 5.9% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 16,507 shares valued at $16.66 million. W.W. Grainger reported Q4 EPS of $9.45, slightly missing estimates, but provided strong FY2026 EPS guidance. The stock carries a consensus "Hold" rating with a target price of $1,096.71 and offers a quarterly dividend of $2.26.

feed.title: Westbourne Investments Inc. Makes New Investment in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Westbourne Investments Inc. has made a new investment in Qualcomm Incorporated, purchasing 48,000 shares valued at approximately $8.21 million, making it their third-largest holding. Qualcomm recently exceeded Q4 estimates with $3.50 EPS and $12.25 billion in revenue, and its board approved a $20 billion share repurchase program alongside paying a quarterly dividend of $0.89. The company's stock currently holds an average "Hold" rating from analysts with a consensus price target of $163.77.

feed.title: Willis Investment Counsel Has $3.52 Million Holdings in Paycom Software, Inc. $PAYC
feed.summary: Willis Investment Counsel significantly increased its stake in Paycom Software (NYSE: PAYC) by 122.2% in the fourth quarter, holding 22,100 shares valued at approximately $3.52 million. Other institutional investors like Allianz, Two Sigma, and Vanguard also made substantial changes to their holdings, contributing to a high institutional ownership of 87.77%. Paycom recently reported strong quarterly earnings, narrowly beating EPS estimates and showing a 10.2% year-over-year revenue increase, alongside announcing a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Growth ETF
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed profile of the Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Growth ETF (FFLG), including its price, dividend information, expense ratio, holdings, and performance metrics. It also features concentration analysis, ESG scores, and technical indicators, offering a comprehensive overview for potential investors. The report positions the ETF within the broader equity market, comparing it to peers and highlighting its significant holdings in major technology companies.

feed.title: Genius Sports Appoints Tony Marlow as Chief Marketing Officer
feed.summary: Genius Sports, a global leader in real-time sports data, has appointed Tony Marlow as its new Chief Marketing Officer. Marlow will lead global marketing, communications, and brand strategy, leveraging his extensive experience in media, technology, and advertising to support Genius Sports' expansion in connecting sports, betting, media, and advertising ecosystems. His appointment aims to accelerate the company's growth and capitalize on the "live moment economy" by enhancing fan engagement and creating value across the sports industry.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Partners PRECISE To Advance Singapore’s Landmark SG100K Biobank Study
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has announced a strategic collaboration with Precision Health Research, Singapore (PRECISE) to further the SG100K biobank study. This partnership aims to integrate multi-omics and AI-driven analytics, utilizing Thermo Fisher's Olink® Proximity Extension Assay platforms and Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometry system to accelerate early disease detection, biomarker discovery, and precision medicine. The collaboration highlights the growing trend of national population studies leveraging proteomics to gain real-time insights into disease biology and transform human health.

feed.title: eBay Opens The NYC Edit Market, an IRL Experience Where Selling Unlocks Access to Shopping
feed.summary: eBay is launching "The NYC Edit Market," a three-day in-person retail experience in SoHo, New York City, where entry requires attendees to list an item for sale on eBay. This market will feature pre-loved fashion items from style insiders and top eBay sellers, inspired by eBay's online "The NYC Edit" guide. The event aims to bring eBay's circular fashion economy to life through interactive shopping, selling, and authentication experiences, with a portion of proceeds benefiting Custom Collaborative.

feed.title: Freshpet Stock Climbs 3% as TD Cowen Raises Rating On Strong Sales
feed.summary: Freshpet (FRPT) stock rose 3% after TD Cowen upgraded the company to Buy, setting an $80 price target, driven by strong fiscal 2025 results where the company surpassed $1 billion in annual revenue and achieved positive free cash flow a year early. Despite a challenging pet food market, Freshpet outgrew the category, maintained market share, and expanded margins, leading analysts to believe the worst is over and the company's growth trajectory is back on track. The upgrade highlights Freshpet's improving fundamentals, new retail strategies, and a stronger balance sheet, suggesting significant upside from its current trading price below the target.

feed.title: Autodesk launches Product Help MCP Server to bring trusted documentation to AI assistants
feed.summary: Autodesk has launched the Product Help MCP Server, a new read-only service that allows external AI agents to securely access Autodesk's extensive help documentation for over 110 products. This initiative aims to provide AI assistants with trusted, up-to-date information, thereby enhancing their ability to deliver accurate answers and support faster learning and problem-solving for customers. Autodesk emphasizes that connecting powerful large language models with high-quality, product-specific knowledge is crucial for creating reliable and useful AI experiences.

feed.title: Fifth Third Recognized Among 2026 USA Today Top Workplaces
feed.summary: For the fifth consecutive year, Fifth Third has been recognized with the 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award, based on employee feedback. The bank also received several Top Workplaces Culture Excellence Awards, including for Appreciation, Employee Well-Being, and Leadership. This recognition highlights Fifth Third's commitment to fostering a people-first culture and its dedication to its employees, customers, and communities.

feed.title: P&G PRO Introduces Mr. Clean PRO: The Dependable New Employee With a Full Cleaning Portfolio to Get the Job Done
feed.summary: P&G PRO is launching Mr. Clean PRO, a new line of professional-grade cleaning products designed to address common pain points for businesses. A survey found that 85% of professionals experience challenges with surface cleaning solutions, and 74% find their current products ineffective against grease and grime. The new Mr. Clean PRO line, which includes all-purpose, degreasing, all-surface, and deep cleaners, aims to offer more effective and efficient commercial cleaning solutions.

feed.title: 11.00% Autocallable Notes Linked to Arista Networks (AMUB) — UBS Offering
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering Trigger Autocallable Yield Notes linked to Arista Networks Inc. (ANET), featuring an 11.00% fixed quarterly coupon and an approximate 3-year term. The notes include an automatic call feature if ANET's closing level meets or exceeds 100% of the initial level, and expose investors to potential principal loss if the final level falls below 50% of the initial level at maturity and the notes have not been called. All payments are subject to UBS's credit risk and Swiss resolution rules, as the notes are unsecured debt obligations.

feed.title: ServiceNow embeds AI across the platform with Context Engine
feed.summary: ServiceNow is enhancing its platform with AI capabilities through a new "Context Engine," which integrates enterprise data, policies, and decision history to power AI-driven workflows. This move positions ServiceNow as an enterprise AI operating layer, offering new tools like Build Agent Skills and an SDK to attract developers, while also introducing an ESM Foundation for easier adoption by mid-sized businesses. CIOs are advised to consider the implications of vendor convergence and potential cost complexities from consumption-based pricing models.

feed.title: Intel and Google to double down on AI CPUs with expanded partnership
feed.summary: Intel and Google have expanded their partnership to enhance the use of AI-focused CPUs and develop custom infrastructure processors. This collaboration aims to meet the growing demand for generalist CPU chips capable of handling heavy AI workloads, especially as companies shift from AI model training to deployment. Google will continue to use Intel's Xeon processors and the new Xeon 6 chips, and the companies will co-develop custom Infrastructure Processing Units (IPUs) to improve computing efficiency, which could help Intel regain market share in the AI boom.
